title: Resettle in Canada as a refugee - Canada.ca
content:
## Resettle in Canada as a refugee
How to be referred as a refugee so you can come to Canada, types of refugees, and the role of the United Nations Refugee Agency.

## Services and information

### How to be resettled in Canada as a refugee
Who can be sponsored as a refugee, what to do after you apply and what to expect when you get to Canada

### Government-Assisted Refugees program
More about this refugee program, who it helps and what happens as we process your application

### After you apply for refugee status
Access health care, get help to adjust to Canada, financial help and refugee rights

### Arriving in Canada as a refugee
Access health care, get help to adjust to Canada, financial help and refugee rights

### Find services for refugees in Canada
Access health care, get help to adjust to Canada, financial help and refugee rights

### Protect yourself from fraud
Stay safe from immigration fraud, such as marriage or document fraud, and email and Internet scams
